candidates.why: This is an explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears to be a decomposition of the already selected parent COGS row 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The earlier mapping notes explicitly preferred the primary direct cost line over decomposition rows such as depreciation/amortization in cost of revenues, so adding it separately would likely double count.

This is an explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears to be a component/decomposition of the already selected parent COGS row 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The earlier mapping notes explicitly indicate those decomposition rows were excluded in favor of the parent cost line, so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The visible COGS D&A rows look like sub-components of that selected parent row rather than separate same-level operating expenses to add later.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is an explicit SG&A-related D&A row shown separately from the selected XSGA component rows. The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Unclassified' plus 'Research & Development Expense', and the earlier mapping notes say D&A/amortization are separately listed and excluded from that selected SG&A component. Therefore this row should be added separately.

The selected XSGA bucket uses 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Unclassified' plus 'Research & Development Expense', and the earlier mapping notes say D&A/amortization are separately listed and excluded. Therefore this row should be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combination of 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Unclassified' and 'Research & Development Expense'. The SG&A depreciation and amortization rows are explicit separate same-level operating lines and appear outside that selected bucket, so they should be added separately. No separate R&D amortization row is present.
